characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Detective SteveMcGarrettis the head of the Five-0 task force at Honolulu. Catchphrase: He usually says "Book em, [insert name here]" or just “Book em”, but the most famous one is "Book em, Danno". The Leader: And he's damn good at it. There's a reason why Senator Dennings appointed him as the head of the Five-0 force. McGarrett's partner and closest friend.

characters.name: Hawaii Five-O Team
